title: pelargonium × jenkinsonii
intro: Pelargonium × jenkinsonii, also known as Red Tip Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Pelargonium × jenkinsonii include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
